workshoptitle: Build a Recipe App with Fusabase

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Review the learner journey and workshop architecture.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Create Your First Project
tutorials.description: Open the console, create your first project, and set the starter security rules.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Connect the Starter App
tutorials.description: Clone the repo, install the SDK, start the server, register a web app, paste the config, and verify the connection.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Build the Public Recipe Experience
tutorials.description: Build a Fusabase query with collection(), query(), and getDocs(), then seed demo data.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Authentication
tutorials.description: Add sign-up, sign-in, and sign-out using the Fusabase auth module.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Write Recipe Data
tutorials.description: Use addDoc(), getDoc(), subcollections, updateDoc(), and auth.currentUser to write recipe data.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Photo Upload
tutorials.description: Upload recipe photos and display them using the Fusabase storage module.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Security Rules
tutorials.description: Replace the permissive starter rule with auth-based access controls.
